an5.25:1.1: “Monks, when right view is supported by five factors, it has awareness-release as its fruit, awareness-release as its reward; has discernment-release as its fruit, discernment-release as its reward.
an5.25:2.2: “There is the case where right view is supported by virtue, supported by learning, supported by discussion, supported by tranquility, supported by insight.
